_meta.method: Web search of Mokusho Zen network, Plum Village resources, and Buddhist directories
knownGaps: Bulgarian Plum Village Sangha is active in Sofia but lacks a standalone website — relight.one used as canonical source
Mokusho Zen House Bulgaria operates primarily via Facebook with no listed street address
No verified Sanbō Zen Bulgaria entity

places.name: Mokusho Zen House Bulgaria
places.notes: Bulgarian branch of the Eastern European Mokusho Zen network (Monk Myoken lineage). Regular zazen and sesshins (e.g. Vratsa).

places.name: Bulgarian Plum Village Sangha
places.lineage: Vietnamese Thiền (Plum Village / Thich Nhat Hanh)
places.notes: Active community of mindfulness practitioners in the Plum Village tradition; meets in Sofia.
